name: Iberville Parish Park and Recreation
description: Come play pickleball at Iberville Parish Park and Recreation in Plaquemine, LA! There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Rosedale Village Park
description: Rosedale Village Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in United States, LA. There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free.

name: Sun Outdoors RV Resort
description: Come play pickleball at Sun Outdoors RV Resort in United States, LA! There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like lights and restrooms.
